prose: Fukui condensed reactivity indices for acrolein computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, PySCF backend), gas phase, neutral singlet/cation doublet/anion doublet. Geometry from input .xyz file; single-point Fukui analysis on neutral state geometry. All three electronic states (N, N+1, N−1) converged. Mulliken partial charges used for condensation. Key findings: most electrophilic site is the terminal vinyl carbon C4 (f⁺ = 0.642), most nucleophilic is the carbonyl oxygen O (f⁻ = 0.394). Full Fukui indices and dual descriptors tabulated above. Integrity check passed; convergence confirmed by charge conservation sums.
